zh.name: 彭斯诚
zh.introduction: 10 年软件开发与架构经验，长期负责商业化、金融及企业平台建设。曾在快手主导前端组件托管平台的 AI 智能化升级，落地 LangGraph 编排、RAG 检索、多模态输入与 SSE 流式交互。现聚焦 AI Agent 应用开发，独立完成方案设计到工程交付。

activities: 围绕 LLM API、结构化输出、Tool Calling、RAG 与 Agent Workflow 系统补齐大模型应用开发知识
梳理目标用户、核心场景和 Agent 工作流，收敛首版可演示范围
当前处于项目启动阶段，产品方案、技术实现和可演示成果待持续补充

en.name: Sicheng Peng
en.introduction: Software engineer and architect with 10 years of experience building commercial, financial, and enterprise platforms. At Kuaishou, led the AI Agent upgrade of a frontend component platform, delivering LangGraph orchestration, RAG retrieval, multimodal input, and SSE streaming. Now focused on LLM applications and Agent systems, with end-to-end engineering experience across React, TypeScript, Node.js, and NestJS.

experience.work: Systematically studying LLM application development and independently developing Creative Agent based on prior enterprise AI project experience.

Defining target users, primary use cases, and the first demonstrable scope
The project is at an early stage; implementation details and demonstrable results will be added as development progresses

Implemented multimodal input and SSE streaming across requirement understanding, component recommendation, code generation, and preview

Designed CI/CD pipelines that balanced shared engineering standards with product-specific release needs
